Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I need to identify cases case id that have a specific sequence of three activities in direct succession Approve Purchase Requisition followed immediately by Create Order followed immediately by Confirm Order No other events in between these three

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Among those cases I need to find cases where the time between Create Order and Confirm Order is more than 5 days

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to exclude all events from such cases and return only events from cases that do not meet both criteria

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: First I need to find cases with the exact sequence For this I can use window functions LAG LEAD to check the sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then I need to check the timing condition more than 5 days between Create Order and Confirm Order Finally I need to exclude all events from those cases

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check timing condition more than 5 days between Create Order and Confirm Order

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait I need to be more careful The DATEDIFF should be between Create Order timestamp and Confirm Order timestamp which would be next timestamp and next next timestamp
